'''yohayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wageless|wageless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-h-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wageless|wageless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yohayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yohayithi|yohayithi]] || [[word:yohayiji|yohayiji]] || [[word:yohayishi|yohayishi]] || [[word:yohayiki|yohayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yohayuthuthu|yohayuthuthu]] || [[word:yohayujuju|yohayujuju]] || [[word:yohayushushu|yohayushushu]] || [[word:yohayukuku|yohayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yohayuthu|yohayuthu]] || [[word:yohayuju|yohayuju]] || [[word:yohayushu|yohayushu]] || [[word:yohayuku|yohayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yohayufthuf|yohayufthuf]] || [[word:yohayufjuf|yohayufjuf]] || [[word:yohayufshuf|yohayufshuf]] || [[word:yohayufkuf|yohayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yohayethe|yohayethe]] || [[word:yohayeje|yohayeje]] || [[word:yohayeshe|yohayeshe]] || [[word:yohayeke|yohayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yohayothotho|yohayothotho]] || [[word:yohayojojo|yohayojojo]] || [[word:yohayoshosho|yohayoshosho]] || [[word:yohayokoko|yohayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yohayotho|yohayotho]] || [[word:yohayojo|yohayojo]] || [[word:yohayosho|yohayosho]] || [[word:yohayoko|yohayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yohayofthof|yohayofthof]] || [[word:yohayofjof|yohayofjof]] || [[word:yohayofshof|yohayofshof]] || [[word:yohayofkof|yohayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yohayÃŸfthÃŸf|yohayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yohayÃŸfjÃŸf|yohayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yohayÃŸfshÃŸf|yohayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yohayÃŸfkÃŸf|yohayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yohayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|yohayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yohayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|yohayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yohayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|yohayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yohayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|yohayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yohayÃŸfthÃŸf|yohayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yohayÃŸfjÃŸf|yohayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yohayÃŸfshÃŸf|yohayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yohayÃŸfkÃŸf|yohayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yohayÃŸfthÃŸf|yohayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yohayÃŸfjÃŸf|yohayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yohayÃŸfshÃŸf|yohayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yohayÃŸfkÃŸf|yohayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yohayÃḊthÃḊ|yohayÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:yohayÃḊjÃḊ|yohayÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:yohayÃḊshÃḊ|yohayÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:yohayÃḊkÃḊ|yohayÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yohayathatha|yohayathatha]] || [[word:yohayajaja|yohayajaja]] || [[word:yohayashasha|yohayashasha]] || [[word:yohayakaka|yohayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yohayatha|yohayatha]] || [[word:yohayaja|yohayaja]] || [[word:yohayasha|yohayasha]] || [[word:yohayaka|yohayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yohayafthaf|yohayafthaf]] || [[word:yohayafjaf|yohayafjaf]] || [[word:yohayafshaf|yohayafshaf]] || [[word:yohayafkaf|yohayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yohayasha|yohayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yohayshÃḋsha|yohayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yohayrosha|yohayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yohaymusha|yohaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yohayasha|yohayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyohaynkshÃḋsha|goyohaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyohaynkrosha|goyohaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyohaynkmusha|goyohaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyohaynkyasha|goyohaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yohahayasha|yohahayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yohahayshÃḋsha|yohahayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yohahayrosha|yohahayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yohahaymusha|yohahaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yohahayasha|yohahayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyohahaynkshÃḋsha|goyohahaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyohahaynkrosha|goyohahaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyohahaynkmusha|goyohahaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyohahaynkyasha|goyohahaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yehÃḊyasha|yehÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yehÃḊyshÃḋsha|yehÃḊyshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yehÃḊyrosha|yehÃḊyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yehÃḊymusha|yehÃḊymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yehÃḊyasha|yehÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyehÃḊynkshÃḋsha|goyehÃḊynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyehÃḊynkrosha|goyehÃḊynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyehÃḊynkmusha|goyehÃḊynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyehÃḊynkyasha|goyehÃḊynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yohfayasha|yohfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yohfayshÃḋsha|yohfayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yohfayrosha|yohfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yohfaymusha|yohfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yohfayasha|yohfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyohfaynkshÃḋsha|goyohfaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyohfaynkrosha|goyohfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyohfaynkmusha|goyohfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyohfaynkyasha|goyohfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
